counterfactual.explanation: Enlarged group Z_6 -> D_6 (added 6 reflections). Original same_orbit=True, modified=True. Orbit count: 130 -> 92. Not critical: relation unchanged under enlarged group.
Removed all symmetry: G = Z_6 -> G' = {e}. Original same_orbit=True, modified=False. Critical: a and b are equivalent only because of rotational symmetry.
Replaced group element with a non-group transposition (swap 0,1). Original same_orbit(a, g·a)=True, modified same_orbit(a, swap·a)=False. Critical: non-group permutations break orbit equivalence.
